message.content:
@startuml
participant "AddressPanel : JPanel" as AddressPanel
participant "ContactsController" as ContactsController
participant "addressFrame: JFrame" as addressFrame
participant "Persistence" as Persistence
participant "RepositoryFactory" as RepositoryFactory
participant "ContactsRepository" as ContactsRepository
participant "BufferedReader" as BufferedReader
participant "FileReader" as FileReader

note over AddressPanel : double clicks on\nthe contact to open a window

AddressPanel -> addressFrame : new (contact)

ContactsController -> addressFrame : tmp = validatePostalCode(postalCode)

ContactsController -> FileReader : create()

FileReader -> FileReader : create(file_name)

loop [while there are lines to read]
    ContactsController -> BufferedReader : readLine()
end

alt [tmp == true]
    addressFrame -> ContactsController : updateAddress(contact, main_address, secundary_address)
    ContactsController -> Persistence : getRepositoryFactory()
    RepositoryFactory -> ContactsRepository : newInstance()
    ContactsController -> RepositoryFactory : getContactsRepository()
    ContactsController -> ContactsRepository : update(contact)
end

@enduml
